description_long: This is a round, white ceramic bowl with a wide rim and a slightly tapered base, featuring a traditional rooster and floral motif on its exterior. The bowl is filled with a yellow, noodle-like substance and several large, grayish spherical objects, likely representing food items such as noodles and meatballs. The rooster design is painted in red and black, accompanied by green leaves and a red flower, giving the bowl a classic, decorative appearance often seen in Southeast Asian tableware. The interior of the bowl is smooth and glossy, contrasting with the matte finish of the painted exterior. The bowl appears sturdy and well-crafted, suitable for serving hot or cold dishes. Its size and shape make it ideal for individual servings of soup or noodles.
description: A white ceramic bowl with a rooster and floral motif, filled with yellow noodles and gray meatball-like objects. The bowl is decorative and functional, typical of Southeast Asian dining.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rooster and floral motif clearly, with noodles and meatballs visible inside.
description_view_1: Rear view with no visible decoration, focusing on the contents of noodles and meatballs.
description_view_2: Side view displaying part of the rooster motif and a clear look at the bowl's contents.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with no visible decoration, highlighting the arrangement of noodles and meatballs.
attribute_decorative_patterns: Rooster and floral motif painted on the exterior side of the bowl
